summary: Current rows4/5/6 c3 contrast: retained-bench full native c3 is generated-token red while the rowchunk2 native-context diagnostic is generated-token green. A focused L40 decode-step-0 trace shows native full-attention first fails at layer 7 attn_input_pre_qkv, while rowchunk2 clears the full pre-QKV/QKV/prepare suite and first fails later at attn_input/context with token still green. This narrows the grouping>=3 blocker away from sampler/output and toward the upstream hidden/row-group interaction feeding full attention and the native full-attention grouped pre-QKV/QKV setup.
